meta.title: Donate | Al-Hayaat School
meta.description: Support Al-Hayaat School with your donation. All donations are eligible for an official tax receipt.
meta.og_description: Support Al-Hayaat School. Registered charity — all donations receive an official tax receipt.

hero.headline: Donate
hero.arabic_verse:
بِسْمِ اللّهِ الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيْمِ
مَثَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ يُنفِقُونَ أَمْوَٰلَهُمْ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ كَمَثَلِ حَبَّةٍ أَنۢبَتَتْ سَبْعَ سَنَابِلَ فِي كُلِّ سُنۢبُلَةٍۢ مِّا۟ئَةُ حَبَّةٍۢ وَٱللَّهُ يُضَـٰعِفُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَٱللَّهُ وَٰسِعٌ عَلِيمٌ
hero.verse_translation: The example of those who spend their wealth in the way of Allah is like a seed [of grain] which grows seven spikes; in each spike is a hundred grains. And Allah multiplies [His reward] for whom He wills. And Allah is all-Encompassing and Knowing.

info.subheadline: Contribute Today For a Brighter Tomorrow
info.body: Thank you for considering to donate to Al-Hayaat. Your donations go the long way in making a difference in society.
info.khums_note: Khums: Al-Hayaat School can collect khums to use a portion for the school. Please reach out at finance@alhayaat.ca for further information.
info.comments_note: Please always mention your full-name and address in the comments.
info.charity_note: Al-Hayaat School is a registered charity. All donations made are eligible for an official tax receipt.

payment_form.address_label: Mailing address (optional — required for tax receipt)
payment_form.stripe_note: You will be redirected to our secure payment processor.

success.headline: Thank You for Your Donation!
success.body: Your generous contribution helps shape the next generation of students. A tax receipt has been emailed to you.

methods.title: Pledge for Donations
methods.body: Please don't hesitate to contact us for pledges or make your pledges here, and our team member will reach out to you.

methods.title: E-Transfer
methods.body: Please send your contributions to finance@alhayaat.ca. Please include your address in the email for the tax receipt.

methods.title: Cheques
methods.body: You can write your cheques to Al-Hayaat School, and mail it to "158 Newbury Drive, Kitchener, ON, N2N 2N8"

methods.title: Credit Card
methods.body: Click below to make a secure donation using your credit or debit card. You will be redirected to our secure payment processor.
